name: @borjie/agent-security-guard
description: SEC-4 / Mr. Mwikila — AI-agent security guard. Detects prompt injection (direct + indirect), validates tool calls against authority tiers, filters outputs for markdown-image exfil + PII + system-prompt leakage, catches jailbreak patterns (many-shot, DAN, GCG), and runs red-team scenarios against the agent surface. Covers OWASP LLM Top 10 (2025), MITRE ATLAS techniques, NIST AI RMF. See Docs/SECURITY/AI_AGENT_SECURITY_SOTA_2026.md.
